reviews.author: OneTrip with Local
reviews.text: The mountain offers a stunning view of Danang City and its long, beautiful coastline, making it an ideal spot for viewing sunsets. The mountain road is also perfect for hiking and mountain biking, with fresh air to breathe.

reviews.author: Gphuot
reviews.text: The first thing you should do when travel to Da Nang that Go to Son Tra peninsula

reviews.author: Hằng
reviews.text: You can drive both automatic scooter and manual scooter, however, automatic scooters are not allowed to reach the very high roads. Son Tra peninsula is worth visiting.

reviews.author: Dung Nguyễn
reviews.text: The mountain offers stunning view of danang city with the long beautiful coastline. Best for sunset. Nice mountain road with fresh air is perfect for hiking and mountain biking.

reviews.author: Han Nguyen
reviews.text: This gem is a must-visit attraction for nature lovers.

reviews.author: Tran Tan Phat
reviews.text: A Natural Haven for Cycling, Running, and Serene Sightseeing! Son Tra Peninsula is an absolute gem nestled in the heart of Da Nang, and it's a place that has captured my heart. From the moment I set foot on this pristine haven, I was mesmerized by its unparalleled beauty. 🚴‍♂️ Cycling Paradise: Cycling enthusiasts, rejoice! The winding roads and scenic trails of Son Tra Peninsula provide the perfect backdrop for an exhilarating ride. The cool breeze from the sea, coupled with breathtaking coastal views, create an experience that's both invigorating and unforgettable. Whether you're a seasoned cyclist or a casual rider, the diverse terrain offers something for everyone. 🏃‍♀️ Runner's Paradise: For those who prefer the rhythm of their own footsteps, Son Tra is a runner's paradise. The well-maintained paths and trails weave through lush greenery, offering a perfect blend of challenge and tranquility. It's a rejuvenating escape from the hustle and bustle, allowing you to connect with nature while breaking a sweat. 🌳 Casual Sightseeing Bliss: If you're in the mood for a leisurely stroll or casual sightseeing, Son Tra Peninsula has you covered. The panoramic views of the coastline, the city of Da Nang, and the surrounding mountains are nothing short of breathtaking. Take your time to explore hidden corners, discover the diverse flora and fauna, and feel the serenity that permeates every corner of this natural haven.

reviews.author: Joyce Nguyen
reviews.text: I can't wait to come back here again when I have more time.

reviews.author: Nguyen Trung
reviews.text: Wonderful view when driving in the road. Feel relaxed and refreshed

reviews.author: Phica Nguyễn
reviews.text: Such a beautiful place to stop for some pics

reviews.author: Sarah Williver
reviews.text: One of the must see areas of Da Nang. South side is well traveled with the Lady Buddha to see and further along an 800 year old Ficus tree. The north side is a twisty winding road not really accessible for cars. On the north side we saw monkeys and amazing views. You can go either way to get to the top.

reviews.author: xxx zzz
reviews.text: The most magical place I have ever seen, so beautiful and peaceful. Enjoy every moment while you there. Try to visit our of a busy hours (morning or evening). Its so naturally amazing, just simply wow!

reviews.author: Jason Ho
reviews.text: Wonderful View on too of Da Nang City!

reviews.author: Hong Duong
reviews.text: Mood booster for me! A must if you visit Danang

reviews.author: Hồng Quyên Nguyễn
reviews.text: A wonder place in DA Nang, rent a motor, spend 4 hours to go around this peninsula, check at some amazing spots. You will make your day

reviews.author: khanhtrang letran
reviews.text: It is super pretty, I can stay here all of the time. It is peaceful place to enjoy your holiday

reviews.author: Trung Phạm
reviews.text: This place is so nice and fresh! I hope the goverment will protect this penilsula and keep it's fresh and clean as it is now!
